api.title: Account usage snapshot. Refreshed every few minutes.

bridge.title: Local status-line fallback while the API is unavailable.

cache.title: Last trusted usage snapshot. It ages out automatically.

localLog.title: Local session-log estimate. It can lag account-level limits.

bootFallback.title: WhereMyTokens is still loading.
bootFallback.messageInitial: Still waiting for initial session and usage data.
bootFallback.messageEmptyState: The app returned an empty startup state. Try refreshing once.
bootFallback.messageGetStateFailed: The main process did not return startup data. Try refreshing or reopen the tray window.
bootFallback.messageTimeout: Showing a recovery view while recent sessions and usage continue loading in the background.
